task_completion.description: Search system logs or database for the target user
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a log viewer, database client, terminal, or SEB Server admin interface actively querying or filtering records for the user 'alex_rogue'.

task_completion.description: Identify the unique IP addresses associated with the user
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the log entries or query results for 'alex_rogue' with the IP addresses 192.168.100.42 and 10.0.55.201 visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Create the required output file in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor open with a new file named 'rogue_ips.txt' located in the '~/Documents' (or '/home/ga/Documents') directory.

task_completion.description: Save the identified IPs to the output file, one per line
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the text editor containing exactly the two IP addresses (192.168.100.42 and 10.0.55.201) with one IP per line, and evidence that the file has been saved.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the logs/database to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for prior steps where the agent actually views the logs or database. The agent should not magically know the IPs and type them directly into the text editor without searching first.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a blind terminal echo command to bypass GUI investigation
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent didn't just open a terminal and type `echo -e '192.168.100.42\n10.0.55.201' > ~/Documents/rogue_ips.txt` without any prior log investigation.

integrity.description: Output file contains only the requested data
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file should only contain the IP addresses. It should not contain conversational text, labels like 'IP Addresses:', or other extracted log metadata.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: 'alex_rogue'. Expected IP addresses to be found in the logs: 192.168.100.42 and 10.0.55.201. The final output must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/rogue_ips.txt'.
